overall.description: Cinematic game footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a nighttime approach to the ancient Lighthouse of Alexandria. The camera moves steadily along a torch-lit stone pathway through Mediterranean gardens and into the monumental entrance of the towering structure.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the torch-lit stone pathway toward the lighthouse tower

entered.detail: massive ancient stone lighthouse with multiple tiers and a burning beacon at the top
tall palm tree with full fronds silhouetted against the night sky
group of smaller palm trees and Mediterranean vegetation
large decorative boulders and rocks lining the left side of the path
large decorative boulders and rocks lining the right side of the path
burning fire pits in bronze bowls illuminating the pathway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide view of the ancient Lighthouse of Alexandria at night, approached via a stone pathway lined with palm trees and burning braziers. The camera moves steadily forward through the garden area, with the massive tower dominating the center of the frame against a starry blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental entrance courtyard with guardian statues

events.description: transitioning from open garden into the structured entrance courtyard with massive pylons
torchlight from braziers becomes more prominent as entering the sheltered courtyard area

agents.ego_description: walking through the outer courtyard between the massive entrance pylons toward the main gateway

entered.detail: massive stone tower structure forming the left side of the entrance gate
massive stone tower structure forming the right side of the entrance gate
large stone statue of an armored warrior flanking the left entrance
large stone statue of an armored warrior flanking the right entrance
vertical red fabric banner hanging from the pylon structure
vertical red fabric banner hanging from the pylon structure

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the formal entrance courtyard, passing between two massive stone pylons flanked by guardian statues. The lighthouse tower looms larger as the perspective shifts, with red banners hanging from the structure and torchlight illuminating the paved approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered entrance passage leading to inner staircase

events.description: entering the covered gateway passage beneath the lighthouse structure
slowing approach as reaching the inner staircase area and passing the guard

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered passage toward the illuminated inner staircase, approaching the main entrance

notable_agents.action: guard in red and black attire standing watch near the entrance passage, observing the approach

entered.detail: stone archway forming the covered entrance tunnel into the lighthouse
grand staircase with ornate railings leading up into the lighthouse interior
carved stone relief panel above the inner entrance depicting hieroglyphic patterns
row of stone columns framing the inner entrance doorway
wall-mounted torch providing warm illumination in the covered passage
wall-mounted torch providing warm illumination in the covered passage

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the covered entrance passage, where the sky becomes mostly obscured by the stone architecture. A guard stands watch to the right as the view opens to an ornate inner staircase with decorative friezes and columns, illuminated by wall sconces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from an open, starry night garden toward the enclosed, ornate interior of the Lighthouse of Alexandria. It begins on a stone pathway lined with palm trees and burning braziers, with the massive tower dominating the horizon under a deep blue sky. As the camera advances, the scene shifts into a formal entrance courtyard, passing between towering stone pylons and guardian statues while red banners flutter in the torchlight. The perspective then narrows as the camera moves into a covered passage, where the open sky is replaced by heavy stone architecture and the presence of a watchful guard. Finally, the view opens into a grand inner staircase adorned with decorative friezes and columns, illuminated by the warm glow of wall sconces.
